1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
2	"""
3	NYS Grade 3 Math Question Generator
4	Aligned to the 2026 NYSED Educators Guide for Grades 3-8 Mathematics Tests.
5	
6	Usage:
7	    python nys_grade3_math_generator.py                         # Full set (all standards)
8	    python nys_grade3_math_generator.py --domain OA             # Filter by domain
9	    python nys_grade3_math_generator.py --standard 3.OA.3       # Single standard
10	    python nys_grade3_math_generator.py --output practice.md    # Save to file
11	    python nys_grade3_math_generator.py --seed 42               # Reproducible output
12	"""
13	import argparse
14	import random
15	import sys
16	from pathlib import Path
17	
18	from standards import STANDARDS, DOMAINS, RUBRICS
19	from questions_oa_nbt import ALL_GENERATORS_OA_NBT
20	from questions_nf_md_g import ALL_GENERATORS_NF_MD_G
21	
22	ALL_GENERATORS = {**ALL_GENERATORS_OA_NBT, **ALL_GENERATORS_NF_MD_G}
23	
24	
25	def generate_questions(domain=None, standard=None):
26	    """Generate questions filtered by domain or standard."""
27	    questions_by_standard = {}
28	
29	    for std_code, gen_fn in sorted(ALL_GENERATORS.items()):
30	        std_info = STANDARDS.get(std_code)
31	        if not std_info:
32	            continue
33	        if domain and std_info["domain"] != domain:
34	            continue
35	        if standard and std_code != standard:
36	            continue
37	        questions_by_standard[std_code] = gen_fn()
38	
39	    return questions_by_standard
40	
41	
42	def format_question(q, num):
43	    """Format a single question as Markdown."""
44	    lines = []
45	    qtype = q["type"]
46	    credits = RUBRICS.get(qtype, {}).get("credits", 1)
47	    type_label = RUBRICS.get(qtype, {}).get("name", qtype)
48	
49	    lines.append(f"**Question {num}** [{q['standard']}] — {type_label} ({credits} credit{'s' if credits > 1 else ''})")
50	    lines.append("")
51	    lines.append(q["stem"])
52	    lines.append("")
53	
54	    if qtype == "MC":
55	        for label in ["A", "B", "C", "D"]:
56	            if label in q["choices"]:
57	                lines.append(f"  {label}) {q['choices'][label]}")
58	        lines.append("")
59	
60	    return "\n".join(lines)
61	
62	
63	def format_answer_key_entry(q, num):
64	    """Format an answer key entry for a single question."""
65	    lines = []
66	    qtype = q["type"]
67	
68	    if qtype == "MC":
69	        lines.append(f"**Q{num}** [{q['standard']}]: **{q['correct']}**")
70	        if q.get("rationale"):
71	            lines.append(f"  *{q['rationale']}*")
72	    else:
73	        lines.append(f"**Q{num}** [{q['standard']}]: **{q['answer']}**")
74	        if q.get("scoring_guide"):
75	            for score, desc in sorted(q["scoring_guide"].items(), reverse=True):
76	                lines.append(f"  - **{score} credit{'s' if score != 1 else ''}**: {desc}")
77	        if q.get("credits", 0) >= 2:
78	            rubric = RUBRICS.get(qtype, {})
79	            if rubric.get("policies"):
80	                for policy in rubric["policies"]:
81	                    lines.append(f"  - *{policy}*")
82	
83	    lines.append("")
84	    return "\n".join(lines)
85	
86	
87	def format_full_report(questions_by_standard):
88	    """Format the complete question set as a Markdown document."""
89	    lines = []
90	    lines.append("# NYS Grade 3 Mathematics — Practice Question Set")
91	    lines.append("*Aligned to the 2026 NYSED Educators Guide for Grades 3-8 Mathematics Tests*")
92	    lines.append("")
93	    lines.append("**Directions:** No calculators are permitted. No reference sheet is provided.")
94	    lines.append("For constructed-response questions, show your work as directed.")
95	    lines.append("A correct answer with no work shown on a 2- or 3-credit question receives 0 credits.")
96	    lines.append("")
97	    lines.append("---")
98	    lines.append("")
99	
100	    all_questions = []
101	    current_domain = None
102	    num = 0
103	
104	    # Sort by domain order, then standard
105	    domain_order = ["OA", "NBT", "NF", "MD", "G"]
106	    sorted_standards = sorted(
107	        questions_by_standard.keys(),
108	        key=lambda s: (domain_order.index(STANDARDS[s]["domain"]), s),
109	    )
110	
111	    for std_code in sorted_standards:
112	        std_info = STANDARDS[std_code]
113	        domain_code = std_info["domain"]
114	
115	        if domain_code != current_domain:
116	            current_domain = domain_code
117	            domain_info = DOMAINS[domain_code]
118	            lines.append(f"## {domain_info['name']} ({domain_info['weight_min']}–{domain_info['weight_max']}% of test)")
119	            lines.append("")
120	
121	        lines.append(f"### NY-{std_code}")
122	        lines.append(f"*{std_info['description']}*")
123	        lines.append("")
124	
125	        for q in questions_by_standard[std_code]:
126	            num += 1
127	            all_questions.append((num, q))
128	            lines.append(format_question(q, num))
129	
130	    # Answer Key
131	    lines.append("---")
132	    lines.append("")
133	    lines.append("# Answer Key and Scoring Guide")
134	    lines.append("")
135	
136	    for num, q in all_questions:
137	        lines.append(format_answer_key_entry(q, num))
138	
139	    # Rubrics
140	    lines.append("---")
141	    lines.append("")
142	    lines.append("# Scoring Rubrics (from 2026 NYSED Educators Guide)")
143	    lines.append("")
144	
145	    for rtype in ["MC", "CR1", "CR2", "CR3"]:
146	        rubric = RUBRICS[rtype]
147	        lines.append(f"### {rubric['name']} ({rubric['credits']} credit{'s' if rubric['credits'] > 1 else ''})")
148	        lines.append("")
149	        lines.append(rubric["description"])
150	        lines.append("")
151	        for score in sorted(rubric["scoring"].keys(), reverse=True):
152	            lines.append(f"- **{score} credit{'s' if score != 1 else ''}**: {rubric['scoring'][score]}")
153	        if rubric.get("policies"):
154	            lines.append("")
155	            lines.append("**Key Scoring Policies:**")
156	            for p in rubric["policies"]:
157	                lines.append(f"- {p}")
158	        lines.append("")
159	
160	    # Stats
161	    total_mc = sum(1 for _, q in all_questions if q["type"] == "MC")
162	    total_cr1 = sum(1 for _, q in all_questions if q["type"] == "CR1")
163	    total_cr2 = sum(1 for _, q in all_questions if q["type"] == "CR2")
164	    total_cr3 = sum(1 for _, q in all_questions if q["type"] == "CR3")
165	
166	    lines.append("---")
167	    lines.append("")
168	    lines.append("# Summary")
169	    lines.append("")
170	    lines.append(f"- **Total questions**: {len(all_questions)}")
171	    lines.append(f"- **Multiple-choice (1 cr)**: {total_mc}")
172	    lines.append(f"- **1-credit CR**: {total_cr1}")
173	    lines.append(f"- **2-credit CR**: {total_cr2}")
174	    lines.append(f"- **3-credit CR**: {total_cr3}")
175	    lines.append(f"- **Standards covered**: {len(questions_by_standard)}")
176	    lines.append("")
177	
178	    domain_counts = {}
179	    for _, q in all_questions:
180	        d = STANDARDS[q["standard"]]["domain"]
181	        domain_counts[d] = domain_counts.get(d, 0) + 1
182	    for d in domain_order:
183	        if d in domain_counts:
184	            pct = domain_counts[d] / len(all_questions) * 100
185	            lines.append(f"- **{DOMAINS[d]['name']}**: {domain_counts[d]} questions ({pct:.0f}%) — target: {DOMAINS[d]['weight_min']}–{DOMAINS[d]['weight_max']}%")
186	
187	    lines.append("")
188	    lines.append("---")
189	    lines.append("*Generated by NYS Grade 3 Math Question Generator — aligned to 2026 NYSED Educators Guide*")
190	
191	    return "\n".join(lines)
192	
193	
194	def main():
195	    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
196	        description="Generate NYS Grade 3 Math questions aligned to the 2026 NYSED Educators Guide.",
197	    )
198	    parser.add_argument(
199	        "--domain",
200	        choices=["OA", "NBT", "NF", "MD", "G"],
201	        help="Filter by domain (e.g., OA, NF, MD)",
202	    )
203	    parser.add_argument(
204	        "--standard",
205	        help="Filter by specific standard (e.g., 3.OA.3)",
206	    )
207	    parser.add_argument(
208	        "--output", "-o",
209	        help="Save output to file (default: print to console)",
210	    )
211	    parser.add_argument(
212	        "--seed", "-s",
213	        type=int,
214	        help="Random seed for reproducible output",
215	    )
216	    args = parser.parse_args()
217	
218	    if args.seed is not None:
219	        random.seed(args.seed)
220	
221	    questions = generate_questions(domain=args.domain, standard=args.standard)
222	
223	    if not questions:
224	        print("No questions generated. Check your --domain or --standard filter.")
225	        sys.exit(1)
226	
227	    report = format_full_report(questions)
228	
229	    if args.output:
230	        out_path = Path(args.output)
231	        out_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
232	        out_path.write_text(report, encoding="utf-8")
233	        total = sum(len(qs) for qs in questions.values())
234	        print(f"Generated {total} questions across {len(questions)} standards -> {out_path}")
235	    else:
236	        print(report)
237	
238	
239	if __name__ == "__main__":
240	    main()
